title: cleistocalyx nervosus
intro: Cleistocalyx nervosus, also known as the 'Pakarang' or 'Yellow Silktree', is a tree species native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia, Thailand, and the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cleistocalyx nervosus include treating fever, headaches, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of essential oils and extracts.
